MARCFieldLabel: NUMBER OF MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS OR VOICES CODE (R)
RDA Registry Label: has medium of performance of musical content
Transformation Notes:
[Expression] → has medium of performance of musical content → [Nomen] 
[Nomen] → has nomen string → [label of $a] + [value of $a]
[Nomen] → has scheme of nomen → [URI for code source specified in 2nd indicator or $2 if 2nd indicator is 7]
Notes (Uncategorized):
2nd indicator code source url: MARC Instrument and Voice Code List (https://www.loc.gov/standards/valuelist/marcmusperf.html)
$2 code source url: (https://www.loc.gov/standards/sourcelist/musical-instrumentation.html) - DC 2024-09-23
